subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! Verily, I noted thy letter and utterance. God hath accepted thy devotion
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
